zh.lifeSummary: 當Esther Tuttle於1672年4月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂時，她的父親Thomas Tuttle37歲，母親Hannah Powell30歲。她於1694年2月27日與Samuel Russell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1724年6月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈文 可隆尼昆尼皮亞享年52歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈文 可隆尼昆尼皮亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Esther Tuttle于1672年4月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂时，她的父亲Thomas Tuttle37岁，母亲Hannah Powell30岁。她于1694年2月27日与Samuel Russell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1724年6月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈文 可隆尼昆尼皮亞享年52岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈文 可隆尼昆尼皮亞。

nameMeanings.name: Tuttle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: possibly a variant of Thirkell, from the Middle English personal name T(h)irkill, T(h)urkill (Old Norse Thorkell, Thorkil, Thurkil, a shortened form of Thorketill from the god's name Thórr ‘Thor’ + ketill ‘kettle, cauldron’).

variants.name: Tuthill
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): variant of Toothill, primarily a Yorkshire habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tōt-hyll ‘lookout hill’, primarily Toothill in Rastrick (Yorkshire) and perhaps Tootle in Longridge (Lancashire), but also Tuttle Hill in Nuneaton (Warwickshire), and Tothill (Lincolnshire). There are several further minor placenames of this type that may have contributed to the surname. Also occasionally from Tottenhill (Norfolk), which derives from the Old English personal name Totta (genitive Tottan) + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Esther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by a Jewish captive who became the wife of the Persian king Ahasuerus. Her Hebrew name was Hadassah ‘myrtle’, and the form Esther is said to be a Persian translation of this, although others derive it from Persian stara ‘star’. It may also be a Hebrew form of the name of the Persian goddess Ishtar. According to the book of the Bible that bears her name, Esther managed, by her perception and persuasion, to save large numbers of the Jews from the evil machinations of the royal counsellor Haman. See also Hester .

historicEvents.description: The city served as co-capital of Connecticut from 1701 until 1873

en.lifeSummary: When Esther Tuttle was born on 9 April 1672, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Thomas Tuttle, was 37 and her mother, Hannah Powell, was 30. She married Samuel Russell on 27 February 1694, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 June 1724, in Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 52, and was buried in Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Esther Tuttle est née le 9 avril 1672, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Tuttle, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Hannah Powell, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Samuel Russell le 27 février 1694, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juin 1724, à Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Esther Tuttle am 9. April 1672 in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Tuttle 37 und ihre Mutter Hannah Powell 30. Sie hat am 27. Februar 1694 in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Samuel Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juni 1724 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Esther Tuttle è nata il il 9 aprile 1672 nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Thomas Tuttle, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Hannah Powell, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Samuel Russell il 27 febbraio 1694, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 giugno 1724, nel Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Esther Tuttleが1672年4月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンで生まれた時，父Thomas Tuttleは37歳，母Hannah Powellは30歳であった。1694年2月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンでSamuel Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1724年6月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヘイベン コロニークイニパアックで52歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヘイベン コロニークイニパアックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Esther Tuttle(이)가 1672년 4월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Tuttle(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Powell(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1694년 2월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 Samuel Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1724년 6월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 하븐 콜론이 퀸이피악에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 하븐 콜론이 퀸이피악에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Esther Tuttle nasceu em 9 de abril de 1672, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Tuttle, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Powell, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Samuel Russell em 27 de fevereiro de 1694, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de junho de 1724, em Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Esther Tuttle родилась 9 апреля 1672 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Thomas Tuttle было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Powell, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Russell 27 февраля 1694 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 июня 1724 г. в местности куиннипяк, ню хавен колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности куиннипяк, ню хавен колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Esther Tuttle nació el 9 de abril de 1672, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Tuttle, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Hannah Powell, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Samuel Russell el 27 de febrero de 1694, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de junio de 1724, en Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America.
